					</div>
					<div class="bee-block bee-block-3 bee-paragraph">
						<p style="word-break:break-word;"><span>Your Street 12, 34567 AB City  /  info@example.com / (+1) 123 456 789</span></p>
					</div>

	</div>
</body>
